untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'Estimated Fundamental Value' which is not available as a marked indicator in the system. The rule depends on external fundamental valuation estimates (discount_threshold: 0.08, valuation_confidence_required: 0.7) that cannot be computed from price/technical indicators alone. Substituted price_pos_20 as a proxy for mean reversion, but this does not accurately capture the fundamental value deviation logic.
translation_notes: MICROSTRUCTURE_DRY_10_1 is a mean reversion / fundamental value strategy. Since fundamental value estimates are not available, translated using price_pos_20 (position within 20-day range) as a technical proxy. Entry long when price is in lower 5% of range (analogous to discount), entry short when in upper 95%. Exit conditions use 3% convergence threshold approximated as close approaching mean. The strategy's core mechanic of exploiting deviations from true fundamental value cannot be fully expressed without external valuation inputs.
